languages.text: "Полковник отправился к руинам ксеносов, откуда лезут твари. Вот уж не завидую я им!"
"The colonel has gone off to the xenoruins, where the beasts emerge. I sure don't envy them!"
languages.original_text: "Полковник отправился к руинам ксеносов, откуда лезут твари. Вот уж не завидую я им!"

traits.locale_text: "The Colonel is off to the xenoruins where the beasts emerge. I sure don't envy them!"
"The Colonel is off to the xenoruins where the beasts emerge. I sure don't envy them!"
"The colonel has gone off to the xenoruins, where the beasts emerge. I sure don't envy them!"
"The colonel has gone off to the xenoruins, where the beasts emerge. I sure don't envy them!"

languages.text: “上校已经去了那片异形遗迹，就是那些畜生冒出来的地方。我可一点都不羡慕他们！”
languages.original_text: "The colonel has gone off to the xenoruins, where the beasts emerge. I sure don't envy them!"

traits.locale_text: “上校已经去了那片异形遗迹，就是那些畜生冒出来的地方。我可一点都不羡慕他们！”

languages.text: "Albay, yaratıkların ortaya çıktığı zeno harabelerine gitti. Doğrusu yerinde olmak istemezdim!"
languages.original_text: "The colonel has gone off to the xenoruins, where the beasts emerge. I sure don't envy them!"

traits.locale_text: "Albay, yaratıkların ortaya çıktığı zeno harabelerine gitti. Doğrusu yerinde olmak istemezdim!"

languages.text: « Le colonel s'est rendu aux xénoruines, là d'où les bêtes sont sorties. Je n'aimerais pas être à leur place ! »
languages.original_text: "The colonel has gone off to the xenoruins, where the beasts emerge. I sure don't envy them!"

traits.locale_text: « Le colonel s'est rendu aux xénoruines, là d'où les bêtes sont sorties. Je n'aimerais pas être à leur place ! »

languages.text: «El coronel ha ido a las xenoruinas, de donde surgen las bestias. ¡No le envidio en absoluto!».
languages.original_text: "The colonel has gone off to the xenoruins, where the beasts emerge. I sure don't envy them!"

traits.locale_text: «El coronel ha ido a las xenoruinas, de donde surgen las bestias. ¡No le envidio en absoluto!».

languages.text: "Der Colonel ist zu den Xenoruinen gegangen, aus denen die Bestien kommen. Seine Leute sind nicht zu beneiden."
languages.original_text: "The colonel has gone off to the xenoruins, where the beasts emerge. I sure don't envy them!"

traits.locale_text: "Der Colonel ist zu den Xenoruinen gegangen, aus denen die Bestien kommen. Seine Leute sind nicht zu beneiden."

languages.text: 「大佐は、獣が出現する異国の遺跡へ行ってしまった。彼らに同情はしない！」
languages.original_text: "The colonel has gone off to the xenoruins, where the beasts emerge. I sure don't envy them!"

traits.locale_text: 「大佐は、獣が出現する異国の遺跡へ行ってしまった。彼らに同情はしない！」
